title: AI company Anthropic sues Trump administration seeking to undo 'supply chain risk' designation
description: Anthropic is suing the Trump administration, asking federal courts to reverse the Pentagon’s decision designating the artificial intelligence company a “supply chain risk” over its refusal to allow unrestricted military use of its technology. Anthropic filed two separate lawsuits Monday, one in California federal court and another in the federal appeals court in Washington, D.C., each challenging different aspects of the Pentagon’s actions against the company. The Pentagon last week formally designated the San Francisco tech company a supply chain risk after an unusually public dispute over how its AI chatbot Claude could be used in warfare. The lawsuits aim to undo the designation and block its enforcement.
content:
Artificial intelligence company Anthropic is suing to stop the Trump administration from enforcing what it calls an “unlawful campaign of retaliation” over its refusal to allow unrestricted military use of its technology.
Anthropic asked federal cour... [1561 chars]

title: OpenAI Acquires Promptfoo to Strengthen AI Security and Testing Tools
description: In a strategic move that underscores the intensifying race to secure advanced artificial intelligence systems, OpenAI acquires Promptfoo, a cybersecurity startup known for its tools designed to test and safeguard complex AI models. The deal, announced Monday by OpenAI, brings the entire Promptfoo team into the organization as the AI powerhouse continues expanding its ecosystem OpenAI acquires Promptfoo to strengthen AI security tools and testing for advanced AI systems.
